title: Triage candidate catalog -> approved shortlist
context: The candidate dataset catalog lists triage signals only; no entry becomes a task until it PASSes gate-002. Binding guardrail: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access and identifiable data are EXCLUDED at gate-002; provenance on every assertion; the deliverable is documentation about the data, never the data itself. This task assigns every catalog entry a disposition with a committed gate artifact and produces an ordered approved shortlist.
objective: Triage the full candidate catalog into dispositions with committed gate artifacts and output an ordered approved shortlist.
acceptanceCriteria: Every entry assigned a disposition with a committed gate artifact: APPROVED (accessTier: open, permitsDerivatives:true cited, PII acceptable), VERIFY-LATER, FLAG (policy), or EXCLUDED (controlled/identifiable).
verify rows resolved with a cited license URL; unresolved rows stay VERIFY-LATER.
FLAG rows (COSMIC/OncoKB/GENIE/IARC) decided strictly per the NC/custom policy with rationale.
EXCLUDE rows (controlled/identifiable) get no dictionary task - confirmed and recorded.
Output is a committed shortlist (>= 6 APPROVED candidates) ordered by realistic adoption path.
